faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SagePostAI.
faq.q1: How does SagePostAI actually create social media content?
faq.a1: SagePostAI combines your topic input with real-time research, brand tone detection, and formatting intelligence to generate professional-grade posts for LinkedIn and Twitter instantly.
faq.q2: What makes SagePostAI better than other AI tools?
faq.a2: We go beyond templates. SagePostAI uses tone styling, grammar cleaning, emoji optimization, and post enrichment to match human-like writing that resonates and performs well.
faq.q3: Can I generate content using an image or screenshot?
faq.a3: Yes! With the Image-to-Post Wizard, you can upload an image or screenshot and SagePostAI will extract key insights, detect context, and generate a relevant post instantly.
faq.q4: How does the Tone Styler feature work?
faq.a4: Tone Styler detects your intended style — casual, professional, or personal — and automatically adjusts sentence flow, wording, and punctuation to match it precisely.
faq.q5: What is the Smart Campaign Builder?
faq.a5: It’s a power feature that lets you plan 3–5 AI posts around a single idea or goal. It generates themed posts for a product launch, a story arc, or an educational series.
faq.q6: Can I edit the generated posts?
faq.a6: Yes. The AI Post Editor helps you clean up grammar, improve sentence clarity, or rephrase sections without losing the original meaning — with one click.
faq.q7: Do I get hashtags and emojis automatically?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Our Visibility Booster adds high-engagement hashtags and relevant emojis to make your post stand out while preserving professionalism and tone.
faq.q8: Do I need experience with social media to use SagePostAI?
faq.a8: Not at all. If you can type a topic, you're ready. We built this for founders, creators, marketers, and even students — no prior expertise needed.
faq.a9: Yes. Our free plan gives you a 3-day free trial with unlimited access to all features. After the trial, you can upgrade to a paid plan to continue using the platform.
faq.a10: You can choose a Monthly Plan ($19.99/month) or Yearly Plan ($197/year). All paid plans include unlimited AI generations and full access to every feature.

problemSolution.title: The Real Struggles of Social Media

c1.title: Too Much Time Spent Writing
c1.desc: Crafting each post from scratch takes forever. SagePostAI generates quality posts instantly based on your topic.

c2.title: Struggling for Post Ideas
c2.desc: You run out of fresh, engaging content ideas quickly. We auto-research and generate creative content tailored to your needs.

c3.title: Inconsistent Posting
c3.desc: You miss optimal times or post irregularly. SagePostAI formats and helps you plan posts for peak impact.

featuresSection.title: Why Choose SagePostAI?
featuresSection.subtitle: Go beyond basic generation. We provide an intelligent suite of tools designed for modern creators.

f1.title: Image to Post Wizard
f1.description: Upload an image and let our AI craft a personalized, descriptive social media post based on its content and your chosen tone.

f2.title: Quick Post Generator
f2.description: Research any topic and instantly generate engaging drafts for Twitter and LinkedIn. Perfect for rapid content creation.

f3.title: Smart Campaign Builder
f3.description: Create cohesive multi-post campaigns. Select content angles, generate series for different platforms, and get repurposing ideas.

f4.title: Trend Explorer
f4.description: Discover what's buzzing on social media. Explore trending topics across platforms and categories to inspire your next viral post.

f5.title: Human-Like AI Writing
f5.description: Posts that sound like you, not a robot — crafted for engagement, not just grammar.

f6.title: Emotion-Aware Intelligence
f6.description: It senses your vibe. Casual, bold, or subtle — SagePostAI mirrors your tone without prompts.

f7.title: Smart Hashtags + Emojis
f7.description: Context-aware enhancers that boost reach without feeling forced.

f8.title: Platform-Tailored Output
f8.description: Each post is fine-tuned for its platform — format, tone, and style aligned.

f9.title: Fast, Frictionless Output
f9.description: Under 2 seconds. Every time. No delays. Just copy, paste, and publish — effortlessly.

s1.desc: Write a topic, upload an image, or pick a category — our AI understands context and adapts to your intent.

s2.step: Step 2: Let AI Do the Work

s3.desc: Copy, refine, or share your post. Or turn it into a multi-post campaign in one click.
